title: Bitcoin HD Wallet Scanner
description: Enumerate all derived addresses and balances from a Bitcoin xpub/ypub/zpub HD wallet key.
useCase: Scan an entire Bitcoin HD wallet from a single xpub/ypub/zpub key — discover all derived addresses, their balances, and total BTC holdings without exposing private keys.

keyParams.walletAddress: Bitcoin HD wallet extended public key — xpub, ypub, or zpub format
